completed_tasks.name: Offline labels helper module + CSS theme tokens

blockers.description: User reported a performance regression: all interactions (text selection popover, tab switching) take several seconds after Phase 14 changes. Root cause not conclusively identified from code inspection alone.
blockers.workaround: Isolation test: replace `const connectivity = useHeartbeat()` with `const connectivity = 'online' as const` and check if slowness disappears. If yes, the heartbeat's state living in the top-level App component is triggering expensive no-dep useLayoutEffect on every re-render.

human_actions_pending.action: Complete browser UAT for Phase 14 (5 items in 14-HUMAN-UAT.md)
human_actions_pending.context: Verification status is human_needed. Items: offline banner appearance, banner dismissal on recovery, theme toggle while offline, keyboard tab order, banner visible across all appState values.

human_actions_pending.action: Investigate performance regression before approving Phase 14
human_actions_pending.context: User reports every interaction takes several seconds after Phase 14. Needs DevTools performance profiling to confirm root cause. Suspected: useHeartbeat() state in App triggers the no-dep useLayoutEffect (DOM walk per annotation per render).

decisions.decision: Both 14-01 tasks committed atomically to keep lint clean
decisions.rationale: Task 1 imports/OfflineBanner/hook-call would produce unused-var errors without Task 2 JSX wiring

decisions.decision: Light-theme --color-banner-text uses #0f172a (UI-SPEC override for contrast), not D-08 literal #f8fafc
decisions.rationale: D-08 literal fails AA contrast (3.04:1); override gives 5.60:1

decisions.decision: Two pre-existing bare {approveLabel}/{denyLabel} usages intentionally NOT wrapped in helpers
decisions.rationale: Those are ConfirmationView done-state text — offline label logic does not apply post-decision

uncommitted_files: .claude/ (GSD framework update files — pre-existing, not from Phase 14)
next_action: 1. Investigate performance regression (isolation test: comment out useHeartbeat call) 2. If heartbeat confirmed as cause, fix by memoizing or lifting state 3. After perf fix, run human UAT (14-HUMAN-UAT.md) 4. If UAT passes, mark phase complete with /gsd-progress
context_notes: Phase 14 code is functionally complete. Both plans executed, tested (39/39 pass), code reviewed (WR-01: Enter shortcut offline, WR-02: Submit Denial hardcoded string). Verification returned human_needed. A performance regression was reported mid-session — exhaustive code review did not find a clear synchronous blocker, pointing to the no-dep useLayoutEffect + annotation DOM walks being triggered more often, or a browser-level issue with the heartbeat fetch. The GSD framework files in .claude/ have accumulated unstaged updates — these are pre-existing and unrelated to Phase 14 work.
